scene.message: Yukino: Eriko?{nl} Hey, are you alright?{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: Eriko!{nl} Get ahold of yourself!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: ...Moron.{nl} So are we.{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Just as I suspected.{nl} That dream is the cause...{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: So the school is safe?{nl} {ctl0f:1} Let's head back!{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: Save Maki's mom, then{nl} we head back fast.{waitkey}{ret}
